_meta.source: hand-curated scam-text starters for the Whomp chat surprise on /
_meta.voice: real scam-text idiom — vague, urgent, mistakenly familiar

scams: URGENT: Your iCloud has been compromised. Click here to verify your identity immediately.
Hi mom it's me, my phone broke can you text me on this number for now?
FedEx: We attempted to deliver your package but missed you. Please confirm your address: bit.ly/fdx-track
Hi Amy, how's John doing today? Long time no chat — would love to catch up.
Congratulations! You've been selected for a $750 Walmart gift card. Click here to claim before midnight.
Hey, are you free this weekend? My yacht in Miami needs a third hand. The pay is incredible.
USPS NOTICE: An issue prevents delivery. Update your information here: usps-track.help
This is Officer Daniels from the IRS. There is a warrant for your arrest. Call this number immediately.
I've been thinking about you. Let's reconnect — I'm in town next week. Coffee?
Your account will be deactivated in 24 hours. Verify your details now to keep your access.
Are you the one who answered the ad about the room? Send me a deposit and I'll send the keys.
Hi I'm Dr. Sarah and I'd love to invest in your work. Can we set up a quick call?
